/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,c1_driver_s__rosidl_typesupport_c.cpython-310-x86_64-linux-gnu.so -o rosidl_generator_py/c1_driver/c1_driver_s__rosidl_typesupport_c.cpython-310-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/c1_driver__rosidl_typesupport_c__pyext.dir/rosidl_generator_py/c1_driver/_c1_driver_s.ep.rosidl_typesupport_c.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/doanh/atlas_c1/build/c1_driver/rosidl_generator_py/c1_driver:/home/doanh/atlas_c1/build/c1_driver:/opt/ros/humble/lib: rosidl_generator_py/c1_driver/libc1_driver__rosidl_generator_py.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libc1_driver__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so libc1_driver__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
